mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_SN, CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, ATCH_FILE_ID, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM COURSE WHERE INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE ( CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subjClId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{instrUserId}, #{courseNm}, #{courseExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thmbImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totLrnTimeCnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{prodMthdCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, NVL(#{coursePrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{rgtrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{lastMdfrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
